english translation text: Ziyarat for Hz. Muslim Ibn Aqil
In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Alláh bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
Peace from God, the lofty the Mighty
Peace from his chosen angels, his dispatched prophets
His chosen Imams, His pious servants
all the martyrs, all the truthful ones
Along with pure goodness be with you in…

arabic text: وَتَرُوحُ عَلَيْكَ يا مُسْلِمَ بْنَ عَقيلِ بْنِ أبي طالِب
english translation text: Your inspired goal o Muslim Ibn ‘Aqil Ibn ‘Abi Talib
Peace be with you o man of righteousness
who is obedient to God, his messenger
The commander of the faithful, al Hasan and al Husayn
May the blessings of god be with them all.

arabic text: اَشْهَدُ اَنَّكَ لَمْ تَهِنْ وَلَمْ تَنْكُلْ،
english translation text: I bear witness that you did not weaken nor did you waver

arabic text: وَاَنَّكَ قَدْ مَضَيْتَ عَلى بَصِيرَةٍ مِنْ اَمْرِكَ مُقْتَدِياً بِالْصّالِحينَ
english translation text: Indeed you performed your duty with insight regarding your affair following the example of the righteous according ….

arabic text: وَمُتَّبِعاً لِلنَّبيّينَ، فَجَمَعَ اللهُ بَيْنَنا وَبَيْنَكَ وَبَيْنَ رَسُولِهِ
english translation text: to the prophets May god gather between you and us, between his messenger and his saints

arabic text: وَاَوْلِيائِهِ في مَنَازِلِ الْمُخْبِتينَ فَاِنَّهُ اَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
english translation text: in the heavenly ranks of those who have submitted to their lords
